programme.title: A Biker's Ballad
programme.sub-title: Exploring MTB’s roots: A must-see for every rider
programme.desc: 14 riders. 7 years. This mountain biking epic takes a two-wheeled journey back to where the sport began in Crested Butte, Colorado, to celebrate its deep-rooted culture.
programme.series-desc: Traversing the history as well as the trails, 14 riders uncover the essence of MTB in Crested Butte, Colorado.

programme.title: More than a Dive
programme.sub-title: The heart of European cliff diving
programme.desc: When the nature challenges the human spirit, it’s time for Red Bull Cliff Diving. Polignano a Mare delivered again: waves, wind and pure sportive excellence.
programme.series-desc: From legends to rookies, Polignano a Mare buzzed with raw energy as the cliff diving elite came to town.

programme.title: Resilience
programme.desc: Follow Els Visser's journey from surviving a ship wreck to becoming a triathlon and Ironman athlete. description : How does surviving a ship wreck lead to someone becoming a successful triathlete? Learn about Els Visser's journey from medical student to sporting success via a life-threatening disaster at sea.
programme.series-desc: Follow Els Visser's journey from surviving a ship wreck to becoming a triathlon and Ironman athlete.

programme.title: More than a Dive
programme.desc: At Mostar’s historic Old Bridge, Red Bull Cliff Diving history was made. The season’s first 10s, the most wildcards, an unexpected title fight, and centuries of tradition in one unforgettable stop.
programme.series-desc: Fierce battles, centuries of tradition: Mostar’s Old Bridge shone in Red Bull Cliff Diving’s penultimate stop.

programme.title: For Reals
programme.sub-title: From a pinball human to 93kph speed skating
programme.desc: Speed skating into the record books at 93kph. Office skateboarding. BASE jumping on Mount Everest. Diving into crocodile waters. It's all in a day's work for Red Bull athletes!
programme.series-desc: Red Bull athletes do it all, from speed skating in Norway to BASE jumping from treacherous Mount Everest.

programme.title: For Reals
programme.sub-title: From freerunning Greek isles to skiing the Streif
programme.desc: A gnarly shipping container BMX set-up. Freerunning in Santorini. Taking on the Streif at night. Enduro riding on a volcano. It's all in a day's work for Red Bull athletes!
programme.series-desc: Red Bull athletes do it all, from skiing down the steepest run at night to slacklining during an eclipse.

programme.title: For Reals
programme.sub-title: From skydiving with skis to flying into a volcano
programme.desc: Flying a plane 245kph through a tunnel. A wingsuit flight across the crater of an active volcano. A record-breaking truck jump in a ghost town. It's all in a day's work for Red Bull athletes!
programme.series-desc: Red Bull athletes do it all, from wingsuit flying over an active volcano to skydiving on skis.

programme.title: For Reals
programme.sub-title: From BASE jumping a cave to a flying mega swing

programme.series-desc: Red Bull athletes do it all, from slacklining the distance of two soccer fields to BASE jumping into a cave.

programme.title: La Liste
programme.sub-title: Skiing phenom takes on the steepest peaks in the Alps
programme.desc: Skiing phenom Jérémie Heitz challenges himself to ski 15 steepest 4,000m peaks in the Alps in just two ski seasons. To do so requires enormous physical endurance and superior mental fortitude!
programme.series-desc: Over the course two seasons, young phenom Jérémie Heitz tries to ski 15 of the steepest peaks in the Alps.

programme.title: Sandro Dias redefines the limits of skateboarding

programme.series-desc: Skateboarder Sandro Dias sets two world records descending from a 22-storey building in Porto Alegre, Brazil.

programme.title: Risking it All
programme.desc: Drivers in Afghanistan brave 5,000 metre-high passes in freezing temperatures to deliver basic goods to the isolated inhabitants of the Wakhan corridor.
programme.series-desc:
Escaping the pressures of modern society proves to be an unforgettable and life-changing adventure as three families set out to live off the land. These families not only unplug their smartphones and tablets, but they also give up electricity and running water for a life off the grid in a drastic last resort to reconnect with each other. From attempting to save their marriage to dealing with family illness to regaining control of their relationships, each family has a different reason for embarking on the journey of a lifetime. The three families pack up their homes, say their good-byes to loved ones, and prepare for the challenges that come with trading in the luxuries of modern-day society for a self-sufficient life.
In a world where we have more forms of connection than ever before we tend to lose ourselves in the constant connectivity. “Risking It All” captures something many modern day families can relate to -- a strive and struggle to revisit building relationships and getting back to basics.

programme.title: The Stream
programme.sub-title: UK-U.S. Tech Deal - Who is Profiting?
programme.desc: Today on the Stream: Is the UK truly becoming an AI hub as U.S. tech giants pour in billions?
programme.series-desc:
The Stream is a daily television programme on Al Jazeera English. It is branded as a “Web community With a Global TV show”. On television and online The Stream taps into the extraordinary potential of social media to disseminate news. The Stream is an aggregator of online sources and discussion, seeking out unheard voices, new perspectives from people on the ground and untold angles related to the most compelling stories of the day.
Previously, the show was hosted by Derrick Ashong and Imran Garda. Lisa Fletcher replaced them as the new presenter. On June 25, 2012, the Stream was relaunched with a new studio and opening graphics. Femi Oke replaced Fletcher when Fletcher was picked to host a version of The Stream on Al Jazeera America.

She has a daughter with Ji Ho, and she would do anything for her. However, she gets tragically betrayed by Ji Ho, the love of her life, over power and money. How will those two mothers end their fierce revenge?

programme.title: The Stream
programme.desc: Powered by social media, The Stream brings fresh perspectives and new voices, beyond the headlines.
programme.series-desc:
The Stream is a daily television programme on Al Jazeera English. It is branded as a “Web community With a Global TV show”. On television and online The Stream taps into the extraordinary potential of social media to disseminate news. The Stream is an aggregator of online sources and discussion, seeking out unheard voices, new perspectives from people on the ground and untold angles related to the most compelling stories of the day.
Previously, the show was hosted by Derrick Ashong and Imran Garda. Lisa Fletcher replaced them as the new presenter. On June 25, 2012, the Stream was relaunched with a new studio and opening graphics. Femi Oke replaced Fletcher when Fletcher was picked to host a version of The Stream on Al Jazeera America.

programme.title: Witness
programme.desc: Carla leads a fight in flood-damaged Valencia, where climate change and mass tourism threaten sea turtles along Spain's devastated coastline.
programme.series-desc: Yu Kyung is a successful woman who is proficient enough to become an executive director of Chunha Group when she started as a secretary. She recently found out her daughter is alive, so she plans to get her back and take her revenge. Meanwhile, Hye Soo is a strong girl who faces challenges head-on. She has a daughter with Ji Ho, and she would do anything for her. However, she gets tragically betrayed by Ji Ho, the love of her life, over power and money. How will those two mothers end their fierce revenge?

programme.series-desc: A news show hosted by Kiryu Coco in which she summarizes the events of the day before. Coco-Kaichou often pitches products as commercial breaks such as her drug AsaCoco which can be inhaled, injected or consumed as a drink. It is tradition to watch Cocos AsaCoco Live News and afterwards Tsunomaki Watames "Watame no Uta" (early morning karaoke format with viewer rock-paper-scissor).

programme.desc: U.S. journalist Chris Hedges explains the next steps as Israel violates the terms of the Gaza ceasefire and expands its land grabs in the West Bank.
programme.series-desc: The Bottom Line is a business discussion programme broadcast in the UK on BBC Radio 4 and the BBC News Channel, and internationally on the BBC World Service and BBC World News. It is co-production between BBC News and The Open University.

programme.title: Risking it All
programme.desc: Out of work gamekeepers in Madagascar are turning to poaching the endangered Rosewood tree, risking arrest, injury and even death.
programme.series-desc:
Escaping the pressures of modern society proves to be an unforgettable and life-changing adventure as three families set out to live off the land. These families not only unplug their smartphones and tablets, but they also give up electricity and running water for a life off the grid in a drastic last resort to reconnect with each other. From attempting to save their marriage to dealing with family illness to regaining control of their relationships, each family has a different reason for embarking on the journey of a lifetime. The three families pack up their homes, say their good-byes to loved ones, and prepare for the challenges that come with trading in the luxuries of modern-day society for a self-sufficient life.
In a world where we have more forms of connection than ever before we tend to lose ourselves in the constant connectivity. “Risking It All” captures something many modern day families can relate to -- a strive and struggle to revisit building relationships and getting back to basics.

programme.desc: As El Fasher is starved, Sudanese journalists struggle to report a war buried by blackouts and global neglect. Plus, Indian media's jingoism abroad.
programme.series-desc: Listening Post is Al Jazeera English's weekly media review show. It casts a critical eye over not just what gets reported, but how it's reported - covering the coverage of the news & analyzing global events through the prism of the media.

programme.title: Witness
programme.desc: Carla leads a fight in flood-damaged Valencia, where climate change and mass tourism threaten sea turtles along Spain's devastated coastline.
programme.series-desc: Yu Kyung is a successful woman who is proficient enough to become an executive director of Chunha Group when she started as a secretary. She recently found out her daughter is alive, so she plans to get her back and take her revenge. Meanwhile, Hye Soo is a strong girl who faces challenges head-on. She has a daughter with Ji Ho, and she would do anything for her. However, she gets tragically betrayed by Ji Ho, the love of her life, over power and money. How will those two mothers end their fierce revenge?

programme.title: The Stream
programme.desc: Powered by social media, The Stream brings fresh perspectives and new voices, beyond the headlines.
programme.series-desc:
The Stream is a daily television programme on Al Jazeera English. It is branded as a “Web community With a Global TV show”. On television and online The Stream taps into the extraordinary potential of social media to disseminate news. The Stream is an aggregator of online sources and discussion, seeking out unheard voices, new perspectives from people on the ground and untold angles related to the most compelling stories of the day.
Previously, the show was hosted by Derrick Ashong and Imran Garda. Lisa Fletcher replaced them as the new presenter. On June 25, 2012, the Stream was relaunched with a new studio and opening graphics. Femi Oke replaced Fletcher when Fletcher was picked to host a version of The Stream on Al Jazeera America.

programme.title: The Listening Post
programme.desc: As El Fasher is starved, Sudanese journalists struggle to report a war buried by blackouts and global neglect. Plus, Indian media's jingoism abroad.
programme.series-desc: Listening Post is Al Jazeera English's weekly media review show. It casts a critical eye over not just what gets reported, but how it's reported - covering the coverage of the news & analyzing global events through the prism of the media.

programme.series-desc: Yu Kyung is a successful woman who is proficient enough to become an executive director of Chunha Group when she started as a secretary. How will those two mothers end their fierce revenge?

programme.title: The Stream
programme.desc: Powered by social media, The Stream brings fresh perspectives and new voices, beyond the headlines.
programme.series-desc:
The Stream is a daily television programme on Al Jazeera English. It is branded as a “Web community With a Global TV show”. On television and online The Stream taps into the extraordinary potential of social media to disseminate news. The Stream is an aggregator of online sources and discussion, seeking out unheard voices, new perspectives from people on the ground and untold angles related to the most compelling stories of the day.
Previously, the show was hosted by Derrick Ashong and Imran Garda. Lisa Fletcher replaced them as the new presenter. On June 25, 2012, the Stream was relaunched with a new studio and opening graphics. Femi Oke replaced Fletcher when Fletcher was picked to host a version of The Stream on Al Jazeera America.

programme.title: Witness
programme.desc: Inspirational and provocative stories providing a fresh and informative insight into the world's key events as they impact on the lives of ordinary people.
programme.series-desc: Yu Kyung is a successful woman who is proficient enough to become an executive director of Chunha Group when she started as a secretary. programme.title: Risking it All
programme.desc: Out of work gamekeepers in Madagascar are turning to poaching the endangered Rosewood tree, risking arrest, injury and even death.
programme.series-desc:
Escaping the pressures of modern society proves to be an unforgettable and life-changing adventure as three families set out to live off the land. These families not only unplug their smartphones and tablets, but they also give up electricity and running water for a life off the grid in a drastic last resort to reconnect with each other. From attempting to save their marriage to dealing with family illness to regaining control of their relationships, each family has a different reason for embarking on the journey of a lifetime. The three families pack up their homes, say their good-byes to loved ones, and prepare for the challenges that come with trading in the luxuries of modern-day society for a self-sufficient life.
In a world where we have more forms of connection than ever before we tend to lose ourselves in the constant connectivity. “Risking It All” captures something many modern day families can relate to -- a strive and struggle to revisit building relationships and getting back to basics.

programme.series-desc: A news show hosted by Kiryu Coco in which she summarizes the events of the day before. Coco-Kaichou often pitches products as commercial breaks such as her drug AsaCoco which can be inhaled, injected or consumed as a drink. It is tradition to watch Cocos AsaCoco Live News and afterwards Tsunomaki Watames "Watame no Uta" (early morning karaoke format with viewer rock-paper-scissor).

programme.title: The Stream
programme.desc: Powered by social media, The Stream brings fresh perspectives and new voices, beyond the headlines.
programme.series-desc:
The Stream is a daily television programme on Al Jazeera English. It is branded as a “Web community With a Global TV show”. On television and online The Stream taps into the extraordinary potential of social media to disseminate news. The Stream is an aggregator of online sources and discussion, seeking out unheard voices, new perspectives from people on the ground and untold angles related to the most compelling stories of the day.
Previously, the show was hosted by Derrick Ashong and Imran Garda. Lisa Fletcher replaced them as the new presenter. On June 25, 2012, the Stream was relaunched with a new studio and opening graphics. Femi Oke replaced Fletcher when Fletcher was picked to host a version of The Stream on Al Jazeera America.

programme.title: Risking it All
programme.desc: Out of work gamekeepers in Madagascar are turning to poaching the endangered Rosewood tree, risking arrest, injury and even death.
programme.series-desc:
Escaping the pressures of modern society proves to be an unforgettable and life-changing adventure as three families set out to live off the land. These families not only unplug their smartphones and tablets, but they also give up electricity and running water for a life off the grid in a drastic last resort to reconnect with each other. From attempting to save their marriage to dealing with family illness to regaining control of their relationships, each family has a different reason for embarking on the journey of a lifetime. The three families pack up their homes, say their good-byes to loved ones, and prepare for the challenges that come with trading in the luxuries of modern-day society for a self-sufficient life.
In a world where we have more forms of connection than ever before we tend to lose ourselves in the constant connectivity. “Risking It All” captures something many modern day families can relate to -- a strive and struggle to revisit building relationships and getting back to basics.
